data.title: Trump likely to delay deadline for tariffs return, according to reports.
data.description: There are growing expectations that President Donald Trump will extend the deadline for the repeal of significant tariffs.

data.title: Article explores financial challenges faced by single female home buyers, focusing on student loan debt. By Amethyst Marroquin.
data.description: A recent study delves into the financial realities of single female home buyers, exploring their unique approaches and obstacles. The research focuses on various demographic groups and how they tackle the home buying process. Specifically, the study examines how single women navigate the challenges they encounter in the housing market. One key area of interest is how student loan debt plays a role in shaping the purchasing power of these individuals. The study sheds light on the strategies employed by single female buyers and the financial landscape they must navigate, revealing important insights for this significant segment of the real estate market.

data.title: Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer focuses on boosting apprenticeships nationwide, amid Trump administration's strong job reports.
data.description: Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer discusses the positive job reports during President Donald Trump's tenure, noting a series of reports that exceeded expectations. She also underscores the importance of increasing the number of apprentices nationwide.

data.title: Trump fires BLS commissioner after disappointing jobs report, turning skepticism into action.
data.description: President Trump took decisive action in response to a recent jobs report that fell short of expectations, by removing the Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) commissioner from his position. This move reflects Trump's long-standing doubts about the accuracy of government economic data. The report indicated a lower-than-anticipated number of jobs created, prompting Trump to make a change at the BLS. The exact numbers from the report are not specified, but it is clear that the discrepancies in the data were significant enough to warrant this action by the President.
CoinShares reports Q2 2025 results, with revenue up 15% to $50 million and a net profit of $8 million.

data.title: Golden Triangle Ventures (GTVH) announces MOU for leadership change and market growth in strategic restructuring, expanding assets.
data.description: On August 7, 2025, in Las Vegas, Golden Triangle Ventures, Inc. (OTC PINK: GTVH) revealed a significant development in its progression. The company has officially signed a binding Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) that signifies a crucial turning point. This agreement ushers in a fresh wave of leadership, high-growth assets, and a strategic vision for the long term.

data.title: CPI in June rises due to Trump tariffs, impacting inflation. S&P 500 suffers as a result. 89 characters.
data.description: In June, the consumer price index indicated a rise in inflation due to the implementation of Trump tariffs. The impact of these tariffs on inflation was noticeable last month. This news has caused a decline in the S&P 500.

data.title: Webull's Q2 FY2025 Earnings Call Transcript shared by Benzinga APIs reveals strong financials: revenue up 46% YoY to $131.5M, adjusted operating profit of $23.3M. Active trading, user growth on track with 800K new users and 144K new funded accounts. Webull capitalized post-De SPAC to innovate and expand globally."crypto trading reintroduced in US, Brazil, Australia."
data.description: Webull Corp (NASDAQ: BULL) reported its second-quarter financial results, showcasing a surge to new heights after-hours. The company announced total revenues of $131.5 million, up 46% year over year, mainly driven by increased customer assets, explosive growth in equities, volumes, delivery of new offerings, and geographic expansion. Adjusted operating profit for the quarter was $23.3 million, marking three consecutive quarters of operating profitability. Webull added approximately 800,000 users in Q2, totaling 24.9 million registered users, with a steady growth in funded accounts reaching about 4.73 million. The company introduced new offerings such as Webull Premium, crypto trading, and expanded partnerships, as well as global expansion into Latin America and European markets. These initiatives are in line with the company's aim to provide a trusted source of market data and insights, cater to evolving customer needs, and drive continued innovation and growth.

data.title: Airwallex wins 3 awards at 2025 Asia Fintech Awards, including Banking Tech, Best Employer, and Director of the Year.
data.description: A global financial platform, Airwallex, emerged victorious at the Asia FinTech Awards 2025 held in Singapore, securing three prestigious accolades. The company achieved a remarkable feat by winning three awards, namely Banking Tech of the Year, Best Employer of the Year, and Director of the Year for Arnold Chan, the General Manager of Asia Pacific. This remarkable hat-trick of awards sets Airwallex apart as the sole recipient of such recognition among numerous contenders. The Asia FinTech Awards is renowned for honoring excellence in the fintech sector, making Airwallex's achievement significant.

data.title: Solana's SOL spiked 4% surpassing Bitcoin and Ethereum in market cap, gaining $77 million in corporate reserves.
data.description: Solana (SOL) performed exceptionally well in the cryptocurrency market on Thursday, surpassing cryptocurrencies with larger market caps following substantial purchases by DeFi Development Corp. (DFDV). DFDV is demonstrating strong momentum in its movements. SOL saw a significant increase of nearly 4%, making it the highest gainer among major cryptocurrencies in the past day. In contrast, Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) experienced slight declines of 0.13% and 0.91% respectively. As the sixth-largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization, SOL broke through a key price barrier from February, reaching a peak of $216. This surge stimulated the derivatives market, as open interest in SOL futures surged by 10% to reach an all-time high of $13.96 billion, as reported by Coinglass. For more details, one can access the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Scientific Industries shifts focus, raises $10M, sells Genie® Division to Troemner, LLC to boost two data-driven platforms.
data.description: In recent updates, it has been reported that sales of electric vehicles (EVs) soared by 72% in the first quarter of this year compared to the same period last year. A total of 420,000 electric vehicles were sold worldwide in the last three months. This increase in sales is attributed to various factors, such as government incentives, a wider selection of EV models, and increasing awareness about environmental issues. The growth in EV sales is a positive sign for the industry's trajectory towards a more sustainable transportation sector. This surge also reflects a shifting trend towards cleaner energy sources in the automotive market. With more consumers opting for electric vehicles, there is an evident rise in the market share of EVs compared to traditional internal combustion engine vehicles. The data indicates a significant shift towards electric mobility and highlights the increasing preference for eco-friendly transportation options globally.

data.title: Mowi ASA's ex-dividend of NOK 1.45 is effective today.
data.description: The latest data indicates that there has been a significant increase in the number of coronavirus cases in the past week, with a total of 10,000 new cases reported. This brings the total number of confirmed cases in the country to 100,000. Additionally, the number of deaths related to COVID-19 has risen to 1,000. Health officials are attributing this spike in numbers to the recent relaxation of lockdown measures and are urging the public to adhere to social distancing guidelines to prevent further spread of the virus.

data.title: Trump fired BLS Commissioner Erika McEntarfer, who was a Biden appointee confirmed with bipartisan support, creating challenges for the next leader.
data.description: On Friday, President Donald Trump terminated BLS Commissioner Erika McEntarfer, who was appointed by Biden with strong bipartisan backing. This decision has negatively impacted BLS’s credibility and will pose significant obstacles for the individual chosen to improve its work quality.

data.title: TOM FORD unveils Black Orchid Reserve campaign starring Tilda Swinton. A collaboration promising a blend of transformation and enchantment.
data.description: In New York, the iconic TOM FORD Black Orchid Reserve campaign features Tilda Swinton, a renowned actor and artist. Swinton expresses her deep admiration for the legendary Black Orchid, stating, "It is a profound honor to be involved in this project that celebrates transformation, blurring boundaries, and magical properties, qualities that have always intrigued me." This collaboration highlights Swinton's unique persona and showcases the exclusivity of the Black Orchid Reserve. The campaign aims to emphasize rarity and enchantment, underlining Swinton's exceptional connection to the brand.
